testcase.name: test_unknown_event_type_is_rejected
testcase.failure:
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/wjmlong/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-wjmlong/pytest-0/test_unknown_event_type_is_rej0')
def test_unknown_event_type_is_rejected(tmp_path: Path) -> None: result = run_fixture(tmp_path, {"event_type": "rehealth.telemetry.persistedd.v1"}) report = json.loads(result.stdout) > assert result.returncode == 1 E assert 0 == 1 E + where 0 = CompletedProcess(args=['D:\rehealthAI\model-service\.venv\Scripts\python.exe', 'D:\rehealthAI\backend\contract... "expected_rejected_reasons": [],
 "rejected": 0,
 "rejected_reasons": [],
 "status": "passed"
}
', stderr='').returncode
backend\contracts	ests	est_validate_contracts.py:29: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_path_like_event_type_is_rejected
testcase.failure:
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/wjmlong/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-wjmlong/pytest-0/test_path_like_event_type_is_r0')
def test_path_like_event_type_is_rejected(tmp_path: Path) -> None: result = run_fixture(tmp_path, {"event_type": "../../outside"}) report = json.loads(result.stdout) > assert result.returncode == 1 E assert 0 == 1 E + where 0 = CompletedProcess(args=['D:\rehealthAI\model-service\.venv\Scripts\python.exe', 'D:\rehealthAI\backend\contract... "expected_rejected_reasons": [],
 "rejected": 0,
 "rejected_reasons": [],
 "status": "passed"
}
', stderr='').returncode
backend\contracts	ests	est_validate_contracts.py:36: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_schema_ref_escape_is_rejected
testcase.failure:
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/wjmlong/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-wjmlong/pytest-0/test_schema_ref_escape_is_reje0')
def test_schema_ref_escape_is_rejected(tmp_path: Path) -> None: result = run_fixture(tmp_path, {"event_type": "rehealth.telemetry.persisted.v1", "$ref": "../../outside"}) report = json.loads(result.stdout) assert result.returncode == 1 > assert "schema_ref" in report["rejected_reasons"] E AssertionError: assert 'schema_ref' in ['schema:additional:$ref', 'schema:missing:batch_id', 'schema:missing:device_ref', 'schema:missing:event_id', 'schema:missing:persistence_status', 'schema:missing:quality_status', ...]
backend\contracts\tests\test_validate_contracts.py:44: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_sensitive_metric_fields_are_rejected[metrics-value0-metric_value]
test_sensitive_metric_fields_are_rejected[heart_rate-72-metric_value]
test_sensitive_metric_fields_are_rejected[spo2-98-metric_value]
test_sensitive_metric_fields_are_rejected[raw_ppg-AAECAw==-raw_signal]
